title: Intense Spicy Moroccan Squid Skewers
description: A pungent and snappy Moroccan dish featuring squid, this recipe is perfect for those who love spicy food and is kid-friendly, made with iron-teppan and broiled to perfection, this shojin-friendly dish is a must try.

ingredients.name: squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite sized pieces

instructions: Preheat the iron-teppan to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the squid pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated squid pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the preheated iron-teppan and broil for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the squid is cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve the squid skewers hot, garnished with lemon wedges and chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as couscous or roasted vegetables.
